t5-7: Good morning! The early bird catches the worm. A beautiful day is starting!

t17-19: It is evening! The sunset outside is beautiful.
t19-21: Good evening, how was your day?
t21-23: It is late, get some rest early. Good night~
t23-5: Are you a night owl? Still awake so late, will you be able to get up tomorrow?
